rows.label: qev086102_MSG0002
rows.name: I didn't want Tatsu to hear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0004
rows.name:
Let's just call this a Lin mission.
Team Elma is on the case![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0006
rows.name: What are friends doing out here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0009
rows.name: Is there new job for Team Tatsu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0011
rows.name:
That's right. It's a Companion
mission. Care to lend a hand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oho! Of course! Elma just
leave everything to Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0014
rows.name:
It'll be more suspicious if we try to
hide it. Just play along, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0016
rows.name: So! What is new job about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0017
rows.name: It's a perfect fit for you, actually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0017_02
rows.name:
We need to speak to the xenos living in
NLA and gather traditional recipes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086102_MSG0018
rows.name:
Oh-ho-ho-hooo! This is perfect job for
Tatsu! Most important mission yet![ST:wait ]
